title: Mirror subitems possible
excerpt:
Is it possible to link sub-items across boards. It feels like this should be easy, but i can’t see how to do it. 
On board one I have a list of projects, and each project has a unique sub item. I want to be able to mirro…

posts.author: stevesommerville (steve sommerville)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is it possible to link sub-items across boards. It feels like this should be easy, but i can’t see how to do it.

On board one I have a list of projects, and each project has a unique sub item. I want to be able to mirror both the item (project) and the task (sub item) onto another board for reporting and measuring, but this doesn’t seem possible?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Steve!

Charlotte here from the monday team!

It is possible to mirror a subitem to a parent item on another board but it is not possible to mirror a subitem to another subitem on a different board.

Sorry for the confusion caused here! I hope this helps clarify!

posts.author: twc (Travis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Why is this not possible?

There are feature requests and discussions going back years asking for this feature.

posts.author: iruser (iruser)
posts.cookedHtml: Charlotte. Great to know it can be done… How can it be done?

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Steve, VLOOKUP is a top marketplace apps that help in advanced sub-item to parent-item or sub item to sub item data sync on monday.com . Also in the same board!

Check this video to learn how
